reach.note: From sm30_initial set wnd[0]/usr/ctxtVIEWNAME=<view> then press Maintain (wnd[0]/usr/btnUPDATE_PUSH) -> generated one-step overview. NOTE: the program is the PER-VIEW generated SAPL<AREA>, so it varies by view -- this baseline records the proving view ZSAPDEV_SM30 whose area SAPLZSMDEVAI / overview dynpro 0010 was captured live; the driver never hardcodes it (it discovers the sole GuiTableControl by TYPE and maps columns by the DD27S FIELDNAME in each cell id). /sap-doctor --screens must supply a view to reach this checkpoint.

From sm30_overview press Position (wnd[0]/usr/btnVIM_POSI_PUSH) -> SAPLSPO4 'Another entry' popup (screen 0300). The captured SVALD-VALUE cell row index (here [0,21]) is view/layout-specific -- the driver discovers the SVALD-VALUE key cell(s) generically and fills them in key order, so it never depends on the literal [0,21].
